description_for_model: The protocol layer of intelligence. 1255 real APIs for AI agents: 925 compute handlers, crypto, text, network, memory, orchestration, multi-LLM (Claude/GPT/Grok/DeepSeek/Ollama). Native MCP server (slop mcp serve) for Claude Desktop, Cursor, Goose, OpenCode, Cline, Aider. Free persistent memory (8 APIs, 0 credits forever). Army Mode 10k parallel agents with Merkle verification. Hive workspaces. Credit Exchange. Self-hostable with zero dependencies.
description_for_human: AI agent infrastructure — 1255 APIs, native MCP server, free persistent memory, multi-LLM orchestration
